---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature address? Who benefits from it?

> Example: "When building an event-driven system, I have to manually configure DLQs and alarms every time. A construct that handles this automatically would save significant boilerplate."

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work? Include API design ideas if you have them.

```typescript
// Example of how you'd want to use it
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples from other tools that do something similar.

---

> **Note:** Feature requests are not guaranteed to be implemented. They are evaluated based on alignment with the project's scope, design principles, and roadmap.
